import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { getStoredDoctor, doctorLogout } from '../services/doctorAuth'; import MedicineDB from '../components/MedicineDB/MedicineDB'; import PatientDB from '../components/PatientDB/PatientDB'; import PrescriptionGenerator from '../components/Prescription/PrescriptionGenerator'; import './DoctorDashboardPage.css'; const DoctorDashboardPage = () => { const [doctor, setDoctor] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const currentDoctor = getStoredDoctor(); if (!currentDoctor) { navigate('/doctor/auth'); } else { setDoctor(currentDoctor); } }, [navigate]); const handleLogout = () => { doctorLogout(); navigate('/doctor/auth'); }; if (!doctor) { return (

Loading dashboard...

); } return (
{/* Sidebar */}

MediCare

Doctor Portal

{doctor.profileImage ? ( ) : ( )}

{doctor.name}

{doctor.specialization}

ID: {doctor.id}
{/* Main Content */}

Welcome, {doctor.name}

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' })}

{activeTab === 'dashboard' && (

Dashboard Overview

Total Patients

156

Today's Appointments

8

Pending Prescriptions

12

Working Hours

{doctor.availableTime || '9:00 AM - 5:00 PM'}

Recent Activity

New patient registered

5 minutes ago

Prescription generated for John Doe

1 hour ago

Appointment scheduled with Sarah Smith

3 hours ago
)} {activeTab === 'medicine' && } {activeTab === 'patients' && } {activeTab === 'prescription' && } {activeTab === 'profile' && (

Doctor Profile

{doctor?.profileImage ? ( ) : ( )}

{doctor?.name}

{doctor?.specialization} • ID: {doctor?.id}

{/* Personal Information */}

Personal Information

Full Name {doctor?.name || 'Not provided'}
Email {doctor?.email || 'Not provided'}
Phone {doctor?.phone || 'Not provided'}
Date of Birth {doctor?.dateOfBirth || 'Not provided'}
Gender {doctor?.gender || 'Not provided'}
{/* Professional Information */}

Professional Information

Specialization {doctor?.specialization || 'Not specified'}
License Number {doctor?.license || 'Not specified'}
Experience {doctor?.experience || 'Not specified'}
Qualification {doctor?.qualification || 'Not specified'}
Hospital/Clinic {doctor?.hospital || 'Not specified'}
Bio {doctor?.bio || 'Not specified'}
{/* Practice Information */}

Practice Information

Consultation Fee {doctor?.consultationFee || 'Not specified'}
Available Days {doctor?.availableDays?.length > 0 ? doctor.availableDays.join(', ') : 'Not specified'}
Available Time {doctor?.availableTime || 'Not specified'}
Clinic Address {doctor?.address || 'Not specified'}
)}
); }; export default DoctorDashboardPage;
